label.description: Spoke label accepted by hub-and-spoke items.

description.description: Explanation of this spoke's relationship to the hub.
description.example: This spoke connects a supporting idea back to the central concept.

icon.description: Required Remix Icon class because the BlockSpec requires icons.

color.description: Optional color token accepted by hub-and-spoke items.

items.label: Spoke One
items.description: This spoke connects a supporting idea back to the central concept.

items.label: Spoke Two
items.description: This spoke shows another dependency that helps explain the whole system.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly hub_and_spoke when using the top-level block.
Every item must include an icon.
